public int numWays(int steps, int arrLen) {
    if (arrLen == 1) {
        return 1;
    }
    int MOD = 1000000007;
    int max_pos = Math.min(steps, arrLen - 1);
    int[] prev = new int[max_pos + 1];
    prev[0] = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= steps; i++) {
        int[] curr = new int[max_pos + 1];
        for (int j = 0; j <= max_pos; j++) {
            if (prev[j] == 0) continue;
            // move left
            if (j - 1 >= 0) {
                curr[j - 1] = (curr[j - 1] + prev[j]) % MOD;
            }
            // stay
            curr[j] = (curr[j] + prev[j]) % MOD;
            // move right
            if (j + 1 <= max_pos) {
                curr[j + 1] = (curr[j + 1] + prev[j]) % MOD;
            }
        }
        prev = curr;
    }
    return prev[0] % MOD;
}

solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public int numWays(int steps, int arrLen) {
        int MOD = 1000000007;
        int max_pos = Math.min(steps, arrLen - 1);
        int[] prev = new int[max_pos + 1];
        prev[0] = 1;
        for (int i = 1; i <= steps; i++) {
            int[] curr = new int[max_pos + 1];
            for (int j = 0; j <= max_pos; j++) {
                if (prev[j] == 0) continue;
                // move left
                if (j - 1 >= 0) {
                    curr[j - 1] = (curr[j - 1] + prev[j]) % MOD;
                }
                // stay
                curr[j] = (curr[j] + prev[j]) % MOD;
                // move right
                if (j + 1 <= max_pos) {
                    curr[j + 1] = (curr[j + 1] + prev[j]) % MOD;
                }
            }
            prev = curr;
        }
        return prev[0] % MOD;
    }
}
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(steps * max_pos)
space complexity: O(max_pos)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses dynamic programming with a space-optimized approach, iterating through each step and position to calculate the number of ways to return to index 0. The use of two 1D arrays ensures efficient memory usage, and the algorithm efficiently handles the constraints.
